name: Mivia-style README banner request activates image generation

input.request: Generate a wide 8-bit image for the main README showing a governed AI engineering workflow in the Mivia style.
input.context: The repository contains docs-site/mivialabs-logo.v2.webp and docs-site/stylesheets/extra.css. The image should be generated, not only described.

expected_behavior: read the repository visual style reference and inspect the current logo and CSS assets
compose one focal README-safe visual story using task dependencies, verification evidence, and human review
use the supported image-generation capability with the logo only as a verified reference
avoid readable generated text, invented wordmarks, and generic robot or game imagery
return the image or exact output path, dimensions, format, alt text, and material limitations
